final:
// // Temperature thresholds for fan speed control
// - Below 20°C: High speed (10)
// - Between 20°C and 30°C: Low speed (00)
// - Above 30°C: Medium speed (01)
module fan_speed_control(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input [7:0] temperature,
    output reg [1:0] fan_speed
);

always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
    if (rst) begin
        fan_speed <= 2'b00; // Default to low speed
    end else begin
        if (temperature < 20) begin
            fan_speed <= 2'b00; // Low speed
        end else if (temperature >= 20 && temperature <= 30) begin
            fan_speed <= 2'b01; // Medium speed
        end else begin
            fan_speed <= 2'b10; // High speed
        end
    end
end

endmodule
